# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: python-web-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: python-web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: python-web-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: python-web-app
        image: python:3.9-slim
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
        volumeMounts:
        - name: flask-config
          mountPath: /app/config
        command: ["gunicorn"]
        args: ["-w 4", "main:app"]
      volumes:
      - name: flask-config
        configMap:
          name: flask-config
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: flask-config
data:
  FLASK_APP: main.py
  FLASK_ENV: production
